info.description: REST API for managing a personal coin collection. Supports coin CRUD, image uploads, AI-powered analysis, user management, auction tracking, and admin features.
info.title: Aurearia API

post.description: Notifies each user with active API keys and lists key names that must be recreated. Replaces existing notifications of this type.

get.description: Returns paginated history of auction ending check runs.
Returns diagnostic info: current time, next 24h window, total lots, lots by status, lots matching the scheduler query, and all BIDDING lots with all their date fields populated

post.description: Manually triggers an auction ending check for all users. Runs synchronously and returns the run details.

get.description: Returns paginated history of auction watch bid digest runs.
get.summary: List auction watch bid digest runs

post.description: Refreshes watched auction lots and sends current-bid digest notifications.
post.summary: Trigger manual auction watch bid digest

get.description: Returns runtime status for the auction watch bid digest scheduler.
get.summary: Get auction watch bid digest scheduler status

get.description: Returns paginated history of wishlist availability check runs.
Returns a single availability check run with all per-coin results.

post.description: Manually triggers a wishlist availability check for all users. Runs synchronously and records the triggering admin user.
Creates a new catalog registry entry.

put.description: Updates an existing catalog registry entry.

delete.description: Deletes a catalog registry entry if not in use.

post.description: Picks one coin per opted-in user and sends notifications. Runs synchronously.
Manually persists collection health snapshots for all users with eligible coins. Runs synchronously. Admin only.

get.description: Returns aggregate collection health metrics across all users. Admin only.
Returns recent in-memory application logs, optionally filtered by level. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a global mint location. Admin only.

put.description: Updates a global mint location. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes a global mint location. Coins with no remaining matching mint location appear as unattributed in the map. Admin only.

get.description: Returns all configured OIDC providers with client secrets redacted.

post.description: Creates an admin-managed OIDC provider. Client secrets are write-only.

put.description: Updates an admin-managed OIDC provider. Empty or omitted clientSecret preserves the existing secret.

delete.description: Deletes an OIDC provider only when no external identities reference it.

post.description: Validates provider discovery metadata and records safe status without exposing secrets. This does not validate the client secret; the provider verifies that only during sign-in or account linking.

get.description: Returns persisted auth/security events with optional type, username, clientIp, and limit filters. Admin only.
Returns release-readiness warnings for public-facing configuration. Admin only.
Returns active IP/CIDR deny rules by default. Admin only.

post.description: Creates an IP/CIDR deny rule with optional expiration. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes an IP/CIDR deny rule. Admin only.

get.description: Returns aggregate auth/security counters and backup status. Admin only.
Returns all application settings merged with defaults. Admin only.

put.description: Updates one or more application settings. Syncs log level if changed. Admin only.

get.description: Returns the built-in default values for all application settings. Admin only.
Validates the configured Anthropic API key by calling Anthropic's models endpoint.
Validates the configured SearXNG URL by making a reachability request.
Returns a list of all registered users. Admin only.

delete.description: Deletes a user and all their associated coins and images. Cannot delete yourself. Admin only.

post.description: Sets a new password for the specified user. Admin only.

put.description: Updates the role for the specified user. Cannot update your own role. Admin only.

post.description: Clears a user's account lock state. Admin only.

get.description: Returns paginated history of scheduled collection valuation runs.

post.description: Manually triggers a collection valuation for all users. Runs asynchronously.

get.description: Returns a single valuation run with all per-coin results.

post.description: Signals a running valuation to stop after the current coin.
Send a message to the AI agent. Response is streamed as Server-Sent Events.
Cancels a pending AI-proposed collection update for the authenticated user.
Commits a pending AI-proposed collection update after explicit user confirmation.

get.description: Returns all saved agent conversations for the current user, newest first.

post.description: Creates a new conversation or updates an existing one.

get.description: Returns a saved conversation with its full message history.

delete.description: Deletes a saved agent conversation.

get.description: Returns a curated list of Anthropic models suitable for the coin search agent.

get.summary: Get portfolio summary for AI analysis

get.description: Returns whether an AI provider is selected for agent features.
Returns user-scoped AI job status and result details.
Returns whether the configured AI provider (Anthropic or Ollama) is usable for coin analysis.
Returns price alerts owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a price alert for an auction lot.

delete.description: Deletes a price alert owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of auction lots belonging to the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Filter by status (watching, bidding, won, lost, passed)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Search across title, description, auction house
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a new auction lot for tracking.

put.description: Sets or clears the calendar event for multiple auction lots at once.
put.summary: Bulk link lots to calendar event

get.description: Returns a map of status â†’ count for the authenticated user, optionally scoped to one auction source.
get.summary: Get auction lot counts by status

post.description: Scrapes a NumisBids lot page and creates an auction lot entry.
Logs into NumisBids or CNG with the user's stored credentials, fetches the selected watchlist, and upserts each lot. Defaults to NumisBids when source is omitted.
Attempts to log in to NumisBids or CNG with the provided credentials. Defaults to NumisBids when source is omitted.

get.description: Returns a single auction lot by ID.

put.description: Updates editable fields on an auction lot owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes an auction lot from tracking.

post.description: Creates an owned Coin from a won auction lot.

put.description: Sets or clears the calendar event association for an auction lot.
Transitions an auction lot to a new status.

get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user. Key values are not included, only metadata.

post.description: Creates a new API key with optional capability scope ('read' or 'read,write'). Defaults to 'read'. The key is returned once and cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description: Revokes an API key so it can no longer be used for authentication.

post.description: Change the authenticated user's password. Requires the current password for verification.
Authenticate with username and password. Returns access token (15min) and refresh token (30 days).

get.description: Returns profile information for the authenticated user.
Returns enabled OIDC providers safe for unauthenticated login UI. Secrets, issuer URLs, and client IDs are omitted.
Exchanges the provider code, validates the ID token, finds a linked identity, and returns app JWT/refresh tokens in the JSON body. Tokens are never placed in URL query strings.
Exchanges the provider code, validates the ID token, and links the external identity to the user recorded in state.

post.description: Creates short-lived link state with PKCE and nonce for the authenticated user and returns the provider authorization URL.
Creates short-lived state with PKCE and nonce and returns the provider authorization URL.
Exchange a valid refresh token for new access and refresh tokens. The old refresh token is revoked (rolling refresh).
Create a new user account. The first registered user is assigned the admin role. Returns access token (15min) and refresh token (30 days).

get.description: Returns whether the application needs initial setup (no users exist yet).
Returns whether the given username has registered WebAuthn credentials for biometric login.
Returns all registered biometric credentials for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes a registered biometric credential.

post.description: Starts biometric authentication for a user. Returns options for navigator.credentials.get().
Completes biometric authentication and returns access + refresh tokens.
Starts credential registration for the authenticated user. Returns options for navigator.credentials.create().
Completes credential registration. Stores the new credential for future biometric logins.

get.description: Returns auction lots and calendar events in a date range.
Returns calendar events owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a calendar event for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a calendar event and linked auction lots.

put.description: Updates a calendar event owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a calendar event owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns all catalog registry entries.
Returns a paginated, filterable list of coins belonging to the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Filter by category (Roman, Greek, Byzantine, Modern, Other)
parameters.name: category

parameters.description: Search across name, denomination, ruler, era, mint, inscriptions, notes
parameters.name: search

post.description: Creates a new coin record for the authenticated user.
Performs a bulk action (tag, set, delete, sell, export, assign-location) on selected coins.

get.description: Returns paginated per-coin metadata health scores for the authenticated user's active collection.

post.description: Explicitly confirms and commits an intake draft into a persistent coin record.

parameters.description: Commit request with explicit confirmation and optional overrides
parameters.name: request

post.description: Uploads one or more coin images and optionally a coin card image, then returns an editable draft.
Analyzes coin/slab images to extract NGC cert, label text, and provides Numista candidates. Returns data compatible with Add to Wishlist/Collection.

parameters.description: Coin or slab images (use multiple files)
parameters.name: images

get.description: Returns a single coin with its images, owned by the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates an existing coin record. Only the coin owner can update it.

delete.description: Deletes a coin and all associated image records. Only the coin owner can delete it.

get.description: Returns user-scoped AI jobs for a coin. Set activeOnly=true to include only queued/running jobs.

post.description: Queues asynchronous AI-powered analysis for the obverse or reverse image of a coin. If side is omitted, all coin images are analyzed.

delete.description: Clears the obverse or reverse AI analysis text for a specific coin.

post.description: Creates a copy of an existing coin owned by the authenticated user. Images and card-related media/state are not copied.
Queues asynchronous AI-powered coin grade estimation for a coin owned by the authenticated user. The grading report is stored in the AI job result and does not update the coin's saved grade.
Queues asynchronous AI-powered current value estimation for a coin owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the computed metadata health score, grade, dimension scores, and checklist of missing items for a specific coin owned by the authenticated user
get.summary: Get metadata health for a single coin

post.description: Upload an image file for a specific coin. Supports setting image type and primary flag.

Upload a raw base64-encoded image for a specific coin. The image field must contain only raw base64 data (no data URI prefix). The fileExtension field (e.g. ".jpg", ".png") tells the API how to save the file. Max 20MB decoded.

delete.description: Deletes an image from a coin. Removes the file from disk and the database record.

get.description: Returns all activity log entries for a coin, newest first.

post.description: Creates a new activity log entry for a coin.

delete.description: Deletes an activity log entry. Only the entry owner can delete it.

put.description: Updates the listing status of a coin (e.g., dismiss an unavailable notice).

post.description: Sets isWishlist to false, moving the coin from wishlist to collection. Optionally accepts purchase details.

get.description: Returns all structured references for a user-owned coin.

post.description: Adds a structured catalog reference to a user-owned coin.

put.description: Updates one structured reference on a user-owned coin.

delete.description: Deletes one structured reference from a user-owned coin.

post.description: Sets isSold to true with a sold price and date, moving the coin from collection to sold gallery.
Attaches one of the authenticated user's tags to one of their coins.

delete.description: Removes a tag association from one of the authenticated user's coins.

get.description: Returns value tracking entries for a coin, ordered oldest first.

post.description: Uploads an image and uses Ollama to extract visible text (e.g., coin inscriptions).

get.description: Returns the most recent Coin-of-the-Day record for the authenticated user.
Returns one Coin-of-the-Day record (with the populated coin) for the authenticated user.

post.description: Retrieve aggregate statistics for the authenticated user's collection
Commit a previously created proposal with explicit confirmation
Retrieve a coin from the authenticated user's collection
post.summary: Get a single coin by ID

post.description: Create a proposal to update allowlisted fields on a coin
Search the authenticated user's collection by query filters
Retrieve the top coins by current value from the authenticated user's collection
post.summary: Get top coins by current value

get.description: Returns all global mint locations for authenticated users.
Returns all notes owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a Markdown-capable note for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns one note owned by the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates one note owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes one note owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns notifications for the current user, newest first.

put.description: Marks all unread notifications as read.

post.description: Sends a test Pushover notification using the authenticated user's saved Pushover configuration.

get.description: Returns the count of unread notifications.

delete.description: Deletes a specific notification.

put.description: Marks a specific notification as read.

get.description: Searches the Numista coin catalog by query string. Requires a Numista API key in admin settings.
Returns whether the configured Ollama instance is reachable and the model is available.
Fetches an image from an external URL and streams it to the client. Limited to 20MB. Only http/https URLs with image content types are allowed.
Lists owner-scoped Quick Capture drafts, defaulting to active drafts.

post.description: Creates an owner-scoped sparse draft with optional obverse/reverse/detail images.

get.description: Returns one owner-scoped Quick Capture draft with image metadata.

put.description: Updates an active owner-scoped draft. Supports field changes and image replacement/removal.

post.description: Marks an active owner-scoped draft as discarded. Idempotent for already-discarded drafts.
Transactionally promotes a valid active draft into a normal Coin. Optional target accepts "collection" or "wishlist" and defaults to "collection". Idempotent on repeat.
Migrates legacy rarity_rating text to structured CoinReference records for the authenticated user's coins. Non-destructive operation.

get.description: Returns bid reminders owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a bid reminder for an auction lot.

delete.description: Deletes a bid reminder owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Fetches a web page and extracts image URL from og:image, twitter:image, or other meta tags. Useful as a fallback when direct image URLs are unavailable.
get.summary: Scrape image URL from a web page

get.description: Get all sets for the authenticated user with aggregate summaries

post.description: Create a new coin set
Compare set performance over a selected range
Create a defined or goal set using custom CSV target definitions
Preview matching coins before saving a smart set

get.description: Get all available built-in set templates for popular collecting series
Get detailed information and aggregates for a specific set

put.description: Update set metadata

delete.description: Delete a set and all its memberships

get.description: Get ROI and velocity analytics for a set
Get all coins that belong to a specific set

post.description: Add a coin to a manual set (not smart sets)

put.description: Persist the full manual order for all coins in a non-smart set

delete.description: Remove a coin from a manual set (not smart sets)

get.description: Get completion metrics including target count, completed count, and missing targets

post.description: Capture a manual valuation snapshot for a set

get.description: Get valuation snapshots for a set
Returns an active public showcase by slug.
Serves a DB-backed uploaded coin image only when it belongs to the active public showcase identified by slug.
Returns showcases owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a showcase for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns one showcase and its coins for the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates metadata and active status for a showcase owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a showcase owned by the authenticated user.

put.description: Replaces the coin membership for a showcase owned by the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns users blocked by the authenticated user.
Returns comments for a visible coin.

post.description: Adds a comment and optional rating to a visible coin.

delete.description: Deletes a comment when requested by the commenter or coin owner.

get.description: Returns aggregate rating stats and the authenticated user's rating for a coin.

put.description: Creates or updates the authenticated user's rating for a visible coin.

post.description: Sends a follow request to a public user.

delete.description: Removes a follow relationship with another user.

get.description: Returns pending and accepted followers for the authenticated user.

put.description: Accepts a pending follow request from another user.
Blocks a user from following the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes a block on another user.

get.description: Returns accepted users the authenticated user follows.
Returns public coins for an accepted followed user.
Returns a limited public coin detail for an accepted followed user.
Returns counts by category/material, total/average values, and wishlist count.
Returns era Ã— category counts for the heat map visualization.
Returns collection-level metadata health score, dimensions, and checklist summary for the authenticated user.
Returns investment, current value, gain/loss, and confidence counts grouped by purchase month or material for the authenticated user's active collection.
Returns all storage locations belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a user-owned storage location.

put.description: Updates a user-owned storage location.

delete.description: Deletes a storage location. Deletion is blocked while any coins still reference it.

get.description: Returns distinct values for the specified field, optionally filtered by a search query. Limited to 20 results.
Returns all tags owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a tag owned by the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates a tag owned by the authenticated user.

delete.description: Deletes a tag owned by the authenticated user and removes its coin associations.

get.description: Serves an uploaded coin image or avatar only when the authenticated user is authorized to view it.

post.description: Uploads and stores a profile avatar image for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user's profile avatar file and clears the avatar path.

get.description: Downloads all coins and images as a ZIP archive containing coins.json (including era and structured references) and image files.
Generates a PDF catalog with photos, grades, provenance, valuations, and structured references.

post.description: Imports coins from a JSON array. Each coin is created fresh with a new ID for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns linked OIDC identities for the current user with subject-safe previews.

delete.description: Unlinks an OIDC identity unless it would leave the account without a usable sign-in method.

put.description: Updates profile, privacy, NumisBids, Pushover, and coin-of-day preferences for the authenticated user.

get.description: Searches public users by username prefix.
Returns public profile metadata for a user.

post.description: Retrieve aggregate statistics for the authenticated API key owner's collection. Requires 'read' capability.
Commit a previously created proposal with explicit confirmation. Requires 'write' capability and valid proposal token. Journals with source 'external_tool_server'.
Retrieve a coin from the authenticated API key owner's collection. Requires 'read' capability.
post.summary: Get a single coin by ID (external)

get.description: Returns the OpenAPI 3.0 document describing the /v1/tools/* surface, suitable for client auto-import.
get.summary: Fetch the external tool server OpenAPI document

post.description: Create a proposal to update allowlisted fields on a coin. Requires 'write' capability. Returns proposal preview with token; no coin write occurs yet.
Search the authenticated API key owner's collection by query filters. Requires 'read' capability.
Retrieve the top coins by current value from the authenticated API key owner's collection. Requires 'read' capability.
post.summary: Get top coins by current value (external)

get.description: Returns value snapshots over time for charting collection value trends.

post.description: Checks all wishlist items with reference URLs to see if they are still available for purchase.

get.description: Lists acquisition discovery search alerts. This is separate from wishlist availability checking.

post.description: Creates a saved discovery alert without creating wishlist items or availability rows.

get.description: Gets one acquisition discovery alert owned by the authenticated collector.

put.description: Updates saved discovery criteria/cadence/active metadata without changing availability state.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a saved discovery alert while preserving history.

post.description: Queues a saved discovery alert run and stores candidates separately from availability checks when processing completes.

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token with the Bearer prefix, e.g. "Bearer eyJhbGci..."
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
